stemHtml: Mark the correct statement concerning lightning discharge…

options.a: The set of possible effects of a lightning discharge does not include welding of aircraft parts such as joints or bearings.
options.b: While flying through air that is electrically charged the aircraft is likely to become a charge carrier itself and can initiate a lightning discharge.
options.c: The probability of a lightning discharge is reciprocally proportional to the strength of the electric field the aircraft intruded.
options.d: Because an aircraft acts as a “”Faraday`s cage””, the magnetisation associated with a lightning discharge hardly has an effect on the magnetic compass.
